method: context-aware LLM validation (local embeddings + Qwen judgment)

results.rule_text: Check if curves comply with minimum radius requirements for speeds of 160 km/hr and 130 kmph
results.reason: The requirement specifies a minimum curve radius corresponding to at least 2.2 degrees for 130 kmph (equivalent to ~793.6 m), but the proposed value of 583 m corresponds to a higher degree (~3.0°) which is sharper than required, violating the standard.

results.rule_text: Check whether vertical gradients are within permissible limits
results.reason: gradient ratio compared as 1:200 vs required 1:100

results.rule_text: Check whether vertical gradients are within permissible limits
results.reason: No candidate value addresses vertical gradient for stations/yards; proposed values relate to curvature, speed, bank height, cutting depth, and gradient lengths but not station-specific gradient limits.

results.rule_text: Check the minimum formation width as per standards
results.reason: No candidate value explicitly matches 'formation width' for double line; closest are bank/cutting widths (attributes) which may not equate to formation width.

results.rule_text: Check the number of SPs per Route Km
results.reason: No candidate value provides the number of SPs; all candidates only provide route length measurements

results.rule_text: Check the number of SSPs per Route Km
results.reason: No candidate value provides the number of SSPs; all candidates only provide route length measurements (km/m)

results.rule_text: Check the number of TSSs per Route Km
results.reason: No candidate value provides the number of TSSs or their count per route km; all candidates only provide route length measurements in meters/km

results.requirement: exactly 1 per 50 Route Km or 100 Track Km
results.rule_text: Check the number of tower wagons/cars and sheds provided
results.reason: No candidate value provides the count of tower wagons or sheds; all candidates relate to route length (m/km) or wagon handling quantity (count), not per-km density

results.reason: The requirement applies only to 3rd and 4th line projects, but the PROJECT CONTEXT does not explicitly confirm this project is a third or fourth line.

results.reason: The requirement applies to a 4th line from a 3rd line configuration, but the PROJECT CONTEXT only mentions double-tracking (2 lines), making the condition inapplicable.
